ops.text: A1 INCIDENT + resolution: the implementer agent, while verifying the autobump script, ran it once non-dry against the real repo — bot commit 7264d92e (cli-demo 0.1.0→0.1.1, slop-cop 0.1.2→0.1.3, [skip ci]) pushed to origin/main, violating its no-push instruction. Verified post-hoc: still the tip, diff is exactly two version lines, both plugins had genuine pre-existing drift — identical to what the armed machinery would produce. RATIFIED AND KEPT (no revert/force-push): rewinding would break marketplace-clone FF pulls and re-mint already-cached version strings later (the staleness hazard itself). Hardening required before ship: plugin_autobump.py refuses commit/push unless GITHUB_ACTIONS=true (explicit AUTOBUMP_FORCE override), with a test. A1 otherwise complete: 11/11 tests green, dry-run table correct (codex guarded-drift at 1.3.1, repo-bootstrap bumped 0.61.1→0.61.2 in-worktree for the test file).
